hero.headline: Building enterprise-level AI systems for real-world businesses.
hero.subheadline: From blue-collar workflows to intelligent automation. We help overlooked industries harness AI that actually matters.

founder.bio: Former enterprise engineering leaders turned AI implementation specialist for traditional businesses. We help family-run, blue-collar, and legacy industries leapfrog into the AI era with practical, impactful solutions.

timeline.event: Engineering Leader at Motorola Solutions, modernizing legacy CCTV solutions
Led team at Amazon, modernizing driver communications technology
Joined Disney, transforming streaming for live sports and events
Founded my consultancy, bringing AI expertise to overlooked industries

testimonials.quote: The AI systems we implemented together saved us 20 hours per week in manual work. Our technicians now focus on what they do best while the AI handles the routine tasks.
testimonials.author: Sarah Johnson

testimonials.quote: We tried expensive off-the-shelf software for years. Nothing worked until this custom AI approach that actually fits how our business operates and learns from our specific needs.
testimonials.author: Michael Chen

testimonials.quote: Finally, someone who understands both cutting-edge AI AND the realities of running a construction business. The perfect bridge we needed to modernize without disruption.
testimonials.author: David Rodriguez

testimonials.quote: Their AI system revolutionized how we plan events. What used to take days of scheduling and coordination now happens automatically, and our DJs arrive prepared with exactly what each venue needs.
testimonials.author: Jason Maxwell

testimonials.quote: The investor matching algorithm they built has completely transformed our funding process. We're now connecting with investors who truly align with our development vision and values.
testimonials.author: Sophia Patel

form.headline: Start with a Free AI Opportunity Assessment
fields: What business challenges are you looking to solve with AI?

apiConfig.systemPrompt: You are an expert consultant who transforms rough ideas into innovative ideas and professional Request for Proposal (RFP) documents. Format the response professionally with sections for Background, Objectives, Requirements, and Expected Outcomes. Use the person's name in the greeting and their email for contact information. Keep it concise but comprehensive.
apiConfig.fallbackMessage: We couldn't formalize your request at this time. Your message will still be submitted as written.
